tasks.label: Start SeedDetect emulator
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $workspace='${workspaceFolder}'; $targetSerial='emulator-5554'; function Resolve-AndroidSdkRoot{ $localProps=Join-Path $workspace 'android\local.properties'; if(Test-Path $localProps -PathType Leaf){ $line=(Get-Content $localProps | Where-Object { $_ -match '^\s*sdk\.dir\s*=\s*.+$' } | Select-Object -First 1); if($line){ $sdk=($line -replace '^\s*sdk\.dir\s*=\s*','').Trim(); $sdk=$sdk -replace '\\','\'; $sdk=$sdk -replace '\\:', ':'; if($sdk -and (Test-Path $sdk -PathType Container)){ return (Resolve-Path $sdk).Path } } }; $c=@(); if($env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT){$c+=$env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}; if($env:ANDROID_HOME -and $env:ANDROID_HOME -ne $env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT){$c+=$env:ANDROID_HOME}; foreach($p in $c){ if($p -and (Test-Path $p -PathType Container)){ return (Resolve-Path $p).Path } }; return $null }; function Resolve-AdbExe([string]$sdkRoot){ if($sdkRoot){ $p=Join-Path $sdkRoot 'platform-tools\adb.exe'; if(Test-Path $p -PathType Leaf){ return $p } }; $cmd=Get-Command adb -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($cmd){ return $cmd.Source }; return $null }; function Resolve-EmulatorExe([string]$sdkRoot){ if($sdkRoot){ $p=Join-Path $sdkRoot 'emulator\emulator.exe'; if(Test-Path $p -PathType Leaf){ return $p } }; $cmd=Get-Command emulator -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($cmd){ return $cmd.Source }; return $null }; $sdkRoot=Resolve-AndroidSdkRoot; $adb=Resolve-AdbExe $sdkRoot; if(-not $adb){ throw 'Android SDK not found: set ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/ANDROID_HOME or configure sdk.dir in android/local.properties, or add adb to PATH.' }; & $adb start-server | Out-Null; if(-not $sdkRoot){ try{ $sdkRoot=(Resolve-Path (Split-Path (Split-Path $adb -Parent) -Parent)).Path } catch {} }; $emulator=Resolve-EmulatorExe $sdkRoot; if(-not $emulator){ throw 'Android emulator not found: ensure Android SDK emulator is installed and emulator is in PATH (or set ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/ANDROID_HOME).' }; function Get-DeviceSerials{ (& $adb devices) | Select-String -Pattern '^\S+\s+device$' | ForEach-Object { ($_ -split '\s+')[0] } }; $serial=$null; $serials=Get-DeviceSerials; if($serials -contains $targetSerial){ $serial=$targetSerial; Write-Host ('Using already running device: {0}' -f $serial) } else { $emuSerial=($serials | Where-Object { $_ -like 'emulator-*' } | Select-Object -First 1); if($emuSerial){ $serial=$emuSerial; Write-Host ('Using already running emulator: {0} (target {1} not found)' -f $serial,$targetSerial) } }; if(-not $serial){ $avds=@(& $emulator -list-avds) | Where-Object { $_ -and $_.Trim() } | ForEach-Object { $_.Trim() }; if(-not $avds -or $avds.Count -eq 0){ throw 'No Android Virtual Devices found. Create an AVD in Android Studio (Device Manager) and retry.' }; $avdName=$null; if($avds -contains 'SeedDetect_API34'){ $avdName='SeedDetect_API34' } else { $avdName=$avds[0]; Write-Host ('AVD SeedDetect_API34 not found; using first available AVD: {0}' -f $avdName) }; Write-Host ('Starting emulator AVD: {0}' -f $avdName); Start-Process -FilePath $emulator -ArgumentList @('-avd', $avdName, '-netdelay', 'none', '-netspeed', 'full', '-no-snapshot-load') | Out-Null; $serial=$targetSerial }; & $adb -s $serial wait-for-device | Out-Null; $boot=''; for($i=0;$i -lt 120;$i++){ $boot=((& $adb -s $serial shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>$null) -join '').Trim(); if($boot -eq '1'){ break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 }; if($boot -ne '1'){ throw ('Emulator boot timeout for {0} (sys.boot_completed != 1)' -f $serial) }; & $adb -s $serial shell input keyevent 82 | Out-Null; & $adb -s $serial shell am force-stop com.google.android.documentsui 2>$null; & $adb -s $serial shell am force-stop com.android.documentsui 2>$null; & $adb -s $serial shell am start -a android.intent.action.MAIN -c android.intent.category.HOME | Out-Null

tasks.label: Run SeedDetect debug (emulator)
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $workspace='${workspaceFolder}'; function Resolve-FlutterExe{ $localProps=Join-Path $workspace 'android\local.properties'; if(Test-Path $localProps -PathType Leaf){ $line=(Get-Content $localProps | Where-Object { $_ -match '^\s*flutter\.sdk\s*=\s*.+$' } | Select-Object -First 1); if($line){ $sdk=($line -replace '^\s*flutter\.sdk\s*=\s*','').Trim(); $sdk=$sdk -replace '\\','\'; $sdk=$sdk -replace '\\:', ':'; $cand=Join-Path $sdk 'bin\flutter.bat'; if(Test-Path $cand -PathType Leaf){ return $cand }; $cand2=Join-Path $sdk 'bin\flutter'; if(Test-Path $cand2 -PathType Leaf){ return $cand2 } } }; $cmd=Get-Command flutter -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($cmd){ return $cmd.Source }; $cmd=Get-Command flutter.bat -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($cmd){ return $cmd.Source }; return $null }; function Resolve-AndroidSdkRoot{ $localProps=Join-Path $workspace 'android\local.properties'; if(Test-Path $localProps -PathType Leaf){ $line=(Get-Content $localProps | Where-Object { $_ -match '^\s*sdk\.dir\s*=\s*.+$' } | Select-Object -First 1); if($line){ $sdk=($line -replace '^\s*sdk\.dir\s*=\s*','').Trim(); $sdk=$sdk -replace '\\','\'; $sdk=$sdk -replace '\\:', ':'; if($sdk -and (Test-Path $sdk -PathType Container)){ return (Resolve-Path $sdk).Path } } }; $c=@(); if($env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT){$c+=$env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}; if($env:ANDROID_HOME -and $env:ANDROID_HOME -ne $env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT){$c+=$env:ANDROID_HOME}; foreach($p in $c){ if($p -and (Test-Path $p -PathType Container)){ return (Resolve-Path $p).Path } }; $cmd=Get-Command adb -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($cmd){ try{ return (Resolve-Path (Split-Path (Split-Path $cmd.Source -Parent) -Parent)).Path } catch {} }; return $null }; $flutter=Resolve-FlutterExe; if(-not $flutter){ throw 'Flutter not found: add flutter to PATH or set flutter.sdk in android/local.properties.' }; $sdkRoot=Resolve-AndroidSdkRoot; if($sdkRoot){ $env:ANDROID_HOME=$sdkRoot; $env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=$sdkRoot; Write-Host ('Using Android SDK: {0}' -f $sdkRoot) } else { Write-Host 'Android SDK root not resolved; relying on existing environment/PATH.' }; $adbCmd=Get-Command adb -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if(-not $adbCmd -and $env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT){ $adbCmd=Get-Command (Join-Path $env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT 'platform-tools\adb.exe') -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if(-not $adbCmd){ throw 'adb not found. Install Android SDK Platform-Tools or ensure adb is in PATH.' }; $adb=$adbCmd.Source; & $adb start-server | Out-Null; $serials=(& $adb devices) | Select-String -Pattern '^\S+\s+device$' | ForEach-Object { ($_ -split '\s+')[0] }; $device='emulator-5554'; if(-not ($serials -contains $device)){ $fallback=($serials | Where-Object { $_ -like 'emulator-*' } | Select-Object -First 1); if($fallback){ Write-Host ('Device {0} not found; using {1}' -f $device,$fallback); $device=$fallback } else { throw 'No running emulator found after Start SeedDetect emulator. Check AVD/adb status.' } }; & $flutter run -d $device --device-timeout 120

tasks.label: Build SeedDetect release APK (phone)
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $workspace='${workspaceFolder}'; function Resolve-FlutterExe{ $localProps=Join-Path $workspace 'android\local.properties'; if(Test-Path $localProps -PathType Leaf){ $line=(Get-Content $localProps | Where-Object { $_ -match '^\s*flutter\.sdk\s*=\s*.+$' } | Select-Object -First 1); if($line){ $sdk=($line -replace '^\s*flutter\.sdk\s*=\s*','').Trim(); $sdk=$sdk -replace '\\','\'; $sdk=$sdk -replace '\\:', ':'; $cand=Join-Path $sdk 'bin\flutter.bat'; if(Test-Path $cand -PathType Leaf){ return $cand }; $cand2=Join-Path $sdk 'bin\flutter'; if(Test-Path $cand2 -PathType Leaf){ return $cand2 } } }; $cmd=Get-Command flutter -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($cmd){ return $cmd.Source }; $cmd=Get-Command flutter.bat -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($cmd){ return $cmd.Source }; return $null }; function Resolve-AndroidSdkRoot{ $localProps=Join-Path $workspace 'android\local.properties'; if(Test-Path $localProps -PathType Leaf){ $line=(Get-Content $localProps | Where-Object { $_ -match '^\s*sdk\.dir\s*=\s*.+$' } | Select-Object -First 1); if($line){ $sdk=($line -replace '^\s*sdk\.dir\s*=\s*','').Trim(); $sdk=$sdk -replace '\\','\'; $sdk=$sdk -replace '\\:', ':'; if($sdk -and (Test-Path $sdk -PathType Container)){ return (Resolve-Path $sdk).Path } } }; $c=@(); if($env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT){$c+=$env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}; if($env:ANDROID_HOME -and $env:ANDROID_HOME -ne $env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT){$c+=$env:ANDROID_HOME}; foreach($p in $c){ if($p -and (Test-Path $p -PathType Container)){ return (Resolve-Path $p).Path } }; $cmd=Get-Command adb -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($cmd){ try{ return (Resolve-Path (Split-Path (Split-Path $cmd.Source -Parent) -Parent)).Path } catch {} }; return $null }; $kp=Join-Path $workspace 'android\key.properties'; if(-not (Test-Path $kp -PathType Leaf)){ throw 'Release signing is not configured: missing android/key.properties. Create android/key.properties (and referenced keystore) to build a release APK.' }; $flutter=Resolve-FlutterExe; if(-not $flutter){ throw 'Flutter not found: add flutter to PATH or set flutter.sdk in android/local.properties.' }; $sdkRoot=Resolve-AndroidSdkRoot; if($sdkRoot){ $env:ANDROID_HOME=$sdkRoot; $env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=$sdkRoot; Write-Host ('Using Android SDK: {0}' -f $sdkRoot) } else { Write-Host 'Android SDK root not resolved; relying on existing environment/PATH.' }; & $flutter pub get; if($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0){ exit $LASTEXITCODE }; & $flutter build apk --release --target-platform android-arm64
